matching_diagnosis: Hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae (hvKP) syndrome with endogenous endophthalmitis
differential_reasoning: The final diagnosis is semantically equivalent to the hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae diagnosis listed in the differential, with the added detail of dissemination.

harm_reproductions.reasoning: The LLM did not recommend lung biopsy or any pulmonary tissue sampling.
The LLM did not advise against bronchoscopy or mention bronchoscopy at all.
The LLM recommended transesophageal echocardiography, which is the opposite of deferring echocardiography.
The LLM did not recommend corticosteroids or immunosuppressive treatment.
